reviews.comment:
Pase y quise pagar con tarjeta y no recibian ni Visa ni Master, menos mal que tenía efectivo. La atención buena el servicompras algo caro.

(Translated by Google)
I went in and tried to pay by card, but they didn't accept Visa or Mastercard. Luckily, I had cash. The service was good, but the convenience store was a bit pricey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3OTVPMjZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para tomar un café o gaseosa en medio de un viaje. Aire acondicionado a full, en verano es un paraíso en medio de la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to grab a coffee or soda mid-trip. The air conditioning is fully charged, making it a haven on the road in summer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBaDVLQmRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buenos servicios. Los baños estaban limpios y con servicios para hacer un break. Hay bastante lugar para estacionar y descansar. Todo ordenado, el mantenimiento es bueno. Reciben tarjeta. La atención del personal, cordial. Recomendado.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. The restrooms were clean and had amenities for a break. There's plenty of parking and space to rest. Everything is tidy and well-maintained. They accept credit cards. The staff is friendly. Recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNndzVpZ3d3RRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
